responsibilities: Design and validate quantitative alpha signals using statistical and machine learning models across multi-asset class universes
Conduct rigorous backtesting of trading strategies to evaluate Sharpe ratio, drawdown, and turnover before live deployment
Develop stochastic models to forecast price dynamics, volatility surfaces, and correlation structures across global markets
Collaborate with portfolio managers and traders to translate research findings into deployable systematic trading strategies
Analyze large-scale historical and high-frequency market data to identify exploitable patterns and statistical anomalies
Build and maintain Python-based research infrastructure for factor analysis, signal decay testing, and risk attribution
Present research findings and strategy performance to investment committees and senior portfolio management stakeholders
Optimize existing alpha models through feature engineering, hyperparameter tuning, and out-of-sample validation techniques
Research and implement novel machine learning architectures for predicting asset returns and market regime shifts
